Water

Ca

Zn

Mn

Bananas are mostly water. More than three-quarters of their weight is just water.

Calcium

Zinc

Manganese

15

12

26

19

P

Mg

Fe

K

Phosphorus

Magnesium

Iron

Potassium

K40

The rest is fiber, carbohydrates, and in much smaller portions, minerals and vitamins.

If this banana weighed 100g, the potassium-40 (k40) in it would be 0.45g.

It would also have smaller amounts magnesium, phosphorus and traces of iron, calcium, zin and manganese.

The rest is fiber, carbohydrates, and in much smaller portions, minerals and vitamins.
